% PCT Specification — Pandoc LaTeX Template
% Based on the default Pandoc template with custom styling
\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}

% ── Fonts & Encoding ─────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[scaled=0.92]{helvet}  % Helvetica (matches target PDF)
\usepackage{inconsolata}          % nicer monospace font
\renewcommand{\familydefault}{\sfdefault}

% ── Page Geometry ────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[
  top=1.2in,
  bottom=1.2in,
  left=1in,
  right=1in
]{geometry}

% ── Colours ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[dvipsnames,svgnames]{xcolor}
\definecolor{pctnavy}{HTML}{1A2744}
\definecolor{pctgold}{HTML}{D4A742}
\definecolor{pctblue}{HTML}{1A2744}       % alias for headings
\definecolor{pctaccent}{HTML}{D4A742}     % accent = brand gold
\definecolor{pctgray}{HTML}{4A4A4A}
\definecolor{codebg}{HTML}{F5F5F5}
\definecolor{rulecolor}{HTML}{CCCCCC}

% ── Typography ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{etoolbox}             % for \pretocmd
\usepackage{parskip}              % space between paragraphs, no indent
\setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}
\sloppy                           % prevent text from overflowing into margins
\setlength{\emergencystretch}{3em}% extra stretch to avoid overfull hboxes

% ── Headers & Footers ───────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\small\color{pctgray}Privacy Claims Token --- Open Specification $if(version)$$version$$else$v0.1$endif$}
\fancyhead[R]{}
\fancyfoot[L]{\footnotesize\color{pctgray}\textcopyright\ 2026 OPSF (Open Privacy Standards Foundation) \pctsep{} opsf.org \pctsep{} CC BY 4.0}
\fancyfoot[C]{}
\fancyfoot[R]{\small\color{pctgray}Page \thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\headrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{pctgold}\leaders\hrule height \headrulewidth\hfill}}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% ── Section Styling ──────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{titlesec}

\setcounter{secnumdepth}{0}       % headings already have manual numbers

\titleformat{\section}[display]
  {\Large\bfseries\color{pctblue}}
  {\color{pctaccent}\rule{\textwidth}{2pt}}
  {0.2em}
  {}

% Force a page break before every \section (after titlesec has redefined it)
\pretocmd{\section}{\clearpage}{}{}

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\large\bfseries\color{pctblue}}
  {}{0pt}{}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}
  {\normalsize\bfseries\color{pctblue}}
  {}{0pt}{}

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.5em}{0.6em}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{1.2em}{0.4em}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{1em}{0.3em}

% ── Code Blocks ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{fancyvrb}           % required by Pandoc highlighting macros
\usepackage{framed}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{listings}

% Pandoc injects Shaded/Highlighting environments + token commands via this variable
$highlighting-macros$

% Dark background for code blocks — must come AFTER highlighting-macros
% since pandoc redefines shadecolor
\definecolor{shadecolor}{HTML}{1A2744}

% Smaller font for code blocks + light text on dark background
\fvset{fontsize=\scriptsize}

% Override syntax highlighting token colours for dark background
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{KeywordTok}{}{\renewcommand{\KeywordTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D4A742}{\textbf{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{DataTypeTok}{}{\renewcommand{\DataTypeTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{81A1C1}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{DecValTok}{}{\renewcommand{\DecValTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{B48EAD}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{BaseNTok}{}{\renewcommand{\BaseNTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{B48EAD}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{FloatTok}{}{\renewcommand{\FloatTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{B48EAD}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{ConstantTok}{}{\renewcommand{\ConstantTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D08770}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{CharTok}{}{\renewcommand{\CharTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{A3BE8C}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{SpecialCharTok}{}{\renewcommand{\SpecialCharTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{A3BE8C}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{StringTok}{}{\renewcommand{\StringTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{A3BE8C}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{VerbatimStringTok}{}{\renewcommand{\VerbatimStringTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{A3BE8C}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{SpecialStringTok}{}{\renewcommand{\SpecialStringTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{A3BE8C}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{ImportTok}{}{\renewcommand{\ImportTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{81A1C1}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{CommentTok}{}{\renewcommand{\CommentTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{616E88}{\textit{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{DocumentationTok}{}{\renewcommand{\DocumentationTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{616E88}{\textit{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{AnnotationTok}{}{\renewcommand{\AnnotationTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D08770}{\textit{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{FunctionTok}{}{\renewcommand{\FunctionTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{88C0D0}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{VariableTok}{}{\renewcommand{\VariableTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D8DEE9}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{ControlFlowTok}{}{\renewcommand{\ControlFlowTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D4A742}{\textbf{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{OperatorTok}{}{\renewcommand{\OperatorTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{81A1C1}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{BuiltInTok}{}{\renewcommand{\BuiltInTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{88C0D0}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{ExtensionTok}{}{\renewcommand{\ExtensionTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D8DEE9}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{PreprocessorTok}{}{\renewcommand{\PreprocessorTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D08770}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{AttributeTok}{}{\renewcommand{\AttributeTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{8FBCBB}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{RegionMarkerTok}{}{\renewcommand{\RegionMarkerTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D8DEE9}{#1}}}
\@ifundefined{InformationTok}{}{\renewcommand{\InformationTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{EBCB8B}{\textit{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{WarningTok}{}{\renewcommand{\WarningTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{BF616A}{\textbf{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{AlertTok}{}{\renewcommand{\AlertTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{BF616A}{\textbf{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{ErrorTok}{}{\renewcommand{\ErrorTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{BF616A}{\textbf{#1}}}}
\@ifundefined{NormalTok}{}{\renewcommand{\NormalTok}[1]{\textcolor[HTML]{D8DEE9}{#1}}}
\makeatother

% Styled code block: dark background, padding, rounded corners
\newtcolorbox{pctcodebox}{
  colback=shadecolor,
  colframe=shadecolor,
  arc=4pt,
  boxrule=0pt,
  left=8pt,
  right=8pt,
  top=6pt,
  bottom=6pt,
  breakable
}
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{Shaded}{%
  \newenvironment{Shaded}{\begin{pctcodebox}}{\end{pctcodebox}}%
}{%
  \renewenvironment{Shaded}{\begin{pctcodebox}}{\end{pctcodebox}}%
}
\makeatother
\lstset{
  basicstyle=\small\ttfamily\color[HTML]{D8DEE9},
  backgroundcolor=\color{shadecolor},
  frame=none,
  rulecolor=\color{shadecolor},
  framesep=6pt,
  xleftmargin=6pt,
  xrightmargin=6pt,
  breaklines=true,
  breakatwhitespace=false,
  tabsize=2,
  showstringspaces=false,
  captionpos=b,
  aboveskip=1em,
  belowskip=1em,
}

% ── Tables ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{colortbl}         % \rowcolor, \arrayrulecolor
\usepackage{calc}             % needed by Pandoc for \real in column widths
\newcounter{none}             % Pandoc sets \LTcaptype{none} to suppress table numbering
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.4}

% ── Links ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=pctblue,
  urlcolor=pctaccent,
  citecolor=pctblue,
  bookmarks=true,
  bookmarksnumbered=false,
  pdfstartview=FitH
]{hyperref}

% ── Lists ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{enumitem}
\setlist{nosep, leftmargin=1.5em}

% Pandoc emits \tightlist for compact lists
\providecommand{\tightlist}{\setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}
\setlist[itemize,1]{label={\color{pctaccent}\textbullet}}
\setlist[itemize,2]{label={\color{pctaccent}--}}

% ── Graphics ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{tikz}

% ── Separator (middle dot) ──────────────────────────────────────────
\newcommand{\pctsep}{\,\textperiodcentered\,}

% ── PDF Metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
\hypersetup{
  pdftitle={Privacy Claims Token (PCT) — Open Specification},
  pdfauthor={OPSF (Open Privacy Standards Foundation)},
  pdfsubject={PCT Specification $if(version)$$version$$else$v0.1$endif$},
  pdfkeywords={privacy, data governance, JWT, claims token, specification}
}

% ── Title Page ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
$if(title)$
\title{}  % suppress default title
$endif$

\begin{document}

% ── Cover Page ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
\thispagestyle{empty}
\pagecolor{pctnavy}

% Gold bar at the very top of the page
\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture, overlay]
  \fill[pctgold] (current page.north west) rectangle ([yshift=-4pt]current page.north east);
\end{tikzpicture}

\vspace*{3cm}

\begin{flushleft}
  {\fontsize{32}{38}\selectfont\bfseries\color{white} Privacy Claims Token}\\[0.5cm]
  {\Large\color{white!70!pctnavy} Open Specification}
\end{flushleft}

\vspace{2cm}

% Metadata card
\begin{tcolorbox}[
  colback=pctnavy,
  colframe=white!25!pctnavy,
  arc=2pt,
  boxrule=0.6pt,
  left=12pt,
  right=12pt,
  top=10pt,
  bottom=10pt
]
{\small\color{white!80!pctnavy}
  $if(version)$$version$$else$0.1$endif$ \pctsep{} Draft for Public Comment\\[0.5em]
  $if(date)$$date$$else$March 2026$endif$\\[0.5em]
  Released under CC BY 4.0\\[0.5em]
  OPSF (Open Privacy Standards Foundation)\\[0.5em]
  \href{https://opsf.org}{\color{pctgold}opsf.org}
}
\end{tcolorbox}

\vspace{1cm}
{\color{pctgold}\rule{\textwidth}{1.5pt}}

\vspace{1.2cm}
{\normalsize\color{white!65!pctnavy}\textit{Making data obligations machine-readable, portable, and enforceable at runtime.}}

\newpage
\nopagecolor
\setcounter{page}{2}

% ── Metadata Table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
{\footnotesize
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.4}%
\arrayrulecolor{rulecolor}
\begin{longtable}[]{@{}>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.15\textwidth}>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.75\textwidth}@{}}
\rowcolor{pctnavy} \textcolor{white}{\textbf{Version}} & \textcolor{white}{\textbf{$if(version)$$version$$else$0.1$endif$ \pctsep{} Draft for Public Comment}} \\
\textbf{Date} & $if(date)$$date$$else$March 2026$endif$ \\
\hline

\hline

\end{longtable}
}

\vspace{0.3em}

\vspace{1em}
\begin{center}
{\small\color{pctgray}\textcopyright\ 2026 OPSF (Open Privacy Standards Foundation) \pctsep{} CC BY 4.0}
\end{center}

% ── Body ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
$body$

\end{document}
